notes: Each dashboard panel is treated as a panel trader only when it emits entry/stop/target geometry.
Audits and context-only panels are not allowed to create fake-forward performance.
Same-minute stop and target collisions are scored stop-first, deliberately conservative.
This is research output only; it does not place orders.
